message:
test(render): add MPC vs PI controller evaluation for frame pacing

Adds a comprehensive proptest-based evaluation comparing Model
Predictive Control (MPC) and Proportional-Integral (PI) controller
strategies for resize frame pacing.

The test generates random terminal resize sequences and measures each
controller's ability to maintain smooth frame delivery under various
conditions (rapid jitter, monotonic growth/shrink, mixed patterns).

Includes proptest regression file to prevent re-discovery of previously
found failure cases.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+# Seeds for failure cases proptest has generated in the past. It is
+# automatically read and these particular cases re-run before any
+# novel cases are generated.
+#
+# It is recommended to check this file in to source control so that
+# everyone who runs the test benefits from these saved cases.
+cc 7c4b13640a82fea8a8b41d39dd7d64e602f6a1b30e06e80e7514737edde8de67 # shrinks to initial = 67.67462347135509, seed = 5270
